data.title: Crypto Broker K33 Rolls Out Collateralized Loans Using Bitcoin and Ethereum
data.description:
Nordic digital asset broker K33 has expanded its product lineup with the launch of a crypto-backed lending service designed for investors who want access to liquidity without selling their digital assets.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/crypto-broker-k33-rolls-out-collateralized-loans-using-bitcoin-and-ethereum/

data.title: 86% Chance Trump Blinks on Tariffs, But Bitcoin Will Tell You First
data.description:
ChatGPT's analysis of Trump's tariff history reveals an 86% likelihood of policy reversal or softening before the February 1 Europe deadline, with Bitcoin's continuous trading positioned to signal diplomatic shifts ahead of traditional markets during the critical 72-hour window.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/86-chance-trump-blinks-on-tariffs-but-bitcoin-will-tell-you-first/

data.title: Cunning Polymarket Investor Played a Big XRP Game! “Won $233,000!”
data.description:
A trader on Polymarket made $233,000 over the weekend by taking advantage of low liquidity in the XRP markets. Continue Reading: Cunning Polymarket Investor Played a Big XRP Game! “Won $233,000!”
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/cunning-polymarket-investor-played-a-big-xrp-game-won-233-000/

data.title: NYSE develops platform for 24/7 trading with tokenized stocks
data.description:
The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) is developing a blockchain platform for tokenized securities with 24/7 trading and instant settlement. The article NYSE develops platform for 24/7 trading with tokenized stocks was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/focus/blockchain/nyse-develops-platform-24-7-trading-tokenized-stocks/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=NYSE+develops+platform+for+24%2F7+trading+with+tokenized+stocks

data.title: AI Chip Startup FuriosaAI To Raise $500Mn In IPO
data.description:
AI chip designer FuriosaAI is seeking to raise as much as $500 million in a funding round before an IPO as it gears up to challenge industry titan Nvidia.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/equities/ai-chip-startup-furiosaai-to-raise-500mn-in-ipo/

source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/termmax-enables-tokenized-stock-collateral/

data.title: Top Crypto Losers Right Now: Sharp Pullbacks Accelerate Across the Market
data.description:
Current market data shows a wave of aggressive downside moves across several small- and mid-cap cryptocurrencies, with losses accelerating over the past 24 hours. As risk appetite rotates selectively toward momentum names, weaker projects are seeing fast drawdowns, highlighting the growing dispersion across the market. The White Whale leads the declines, sliding 31. 1% to $0
source: https://www.ethnews.com/top-crypto-losers-right-now-sharp-pullbacks-accelerate-across-the-market/

source: https://cryptopotato.com/ethereum-eth-eyes-breakout-as-bulls-defend-3-2k-level/
